description_long: This object consists of a single white cigarette with a tan filter, positioned next to a rectangular cigarette box. The box is predominantly red and white, with the iconic Marlboro branding in bold black letters on the front and side. The front of the box features a gold emblem with two lions and a crown, as well as a prominent health warning in French, 'Fumer tue.' The side of the box displays a barcode and the brand name vertically. The cigarette itself is slender, with a smooth white paper body and a light brown filter tip, showing no signs of burning or ash. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage, burn marks, or discoloration.
description: A white cigarette with a tan filter stands beside a red and white Marlboro-branded box featuring bold logos and a health warning. The cigarette is unlit and pristine, with no burn marks or ash.
description_view_0: The cigarette stands in front of the box, showing the top and part of the front face with the gold emblem visible.
description_view_1: The front of the box is fully visible, displaying the Marlboro logo, gold emblem, and 'Fumer tue' warning, with the cigarette to the left.
description_view_2: The side of the box is shown, featuring the vertical Marlboro logo and a barcode, with no cigarette visible.
description_view_3: The back of the box is visible with the Marlboro logo and gold emblem, and the cigarette is positioned to the right.
attribute_brand_logo: The box displays the Marlboro brand name in bold black letters, a gold emblem with two lions and a crown, and the letters 'PM' in a red circle.
